---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[REQUEST] Brief feature description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: sravioli

---

## Problem statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
- What problem are you trying to solve?
- Who would benefit from this feature?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you want to happen.

- How should this feature work?
- What would be the expected behavior?

## Alternative approaches
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
- Why is your proposed solution better?
- Are there any trade-offs?

## Use cases
Explain specific scenarios where this feature would be useful.

- Workflow improvements
- Time savings
- Functionality that is currently missing

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
- Links to similar features in other projects (if applicable)
- References to relevant discussions or issues
